description: Large monorepo diff with 30+ files across many directories. Tests the strategy selection under pressure — too many directories for clean splitting, so directory-deep or chunks may win depending on the structure. The needsConfirm flag should be true when top candidates are close.
rationale: 32 files across 4 top-level directories. Directory at depth 1 produces 5 groups but services=13 files creates severe imbalance (maxGroupSize penalty). Chunks strategy with maxPerGroup=10 produces 4 groups (10+10+10+2), scoring 0.94 thanks to split count within 3-7 sweet spot and strong maxSizeScore. Directory scores only 0.80 due to the services group imbalance.
